overall.description: A first-person walk through a cyberpunk city at night, starting along a neon-lit canal, passing through a covered arcade with vending machines, and emerging into an open plaza dominated by massive industrial ventilation fans. The footage is from a video game with high-quality cinematic rendering.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a canal-side walkway in a cyberpunk city at night. Neon lights and holographic advertisements illuminate the buildings across the water while the camera moves steadily forward along the concrete path.

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a covered pedestrian arcade with concrete pillars and green neon lighting. A person sits on the ground to the left while a woman stands near a bench on the right. The environment shifts from open to semi-enclosed.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves deeper through the covered walkway, passing a Burrito XXL vending machine on the right. The space opens up ahead revealing massive industrial ventilation fans as the environment transitions from covered to open.

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges into a wide open plaza dominated by massive industrial ventilation fans on the left. The ground transitions to asphalt with green construction barriers on the right. Pedestrians walk along the path, including one carrying a blue umbrella, as the camera approaches the imposing industrial structures.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit canal walkway into a semi-enclosed arcade and finally out into a vast industrial plaza. It begins along a concrete path beside a canal, where holographic advertisements and vibrant lights reflect off the water. As the camera moves forward, the open air gives way to a covered pedestrian arcade defined by concrete pillars and a green neon glow, passing a seated figure and a woman by a bench. The scene then shifts deeper into the walkway, gliding past a Burrito XXL vending machine before the ceiling vanishes to reveal a wide opening. Finally, the camera emerges onto an asphalt plaza dominated by massive industrial ventilation fans and green construction barriers, moving past pedestrians and a person with a blue umbrella toward the imposing machinery.
